title: The Survival Game Tightens
description: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene centers on Eneru, Nami, Luffy, Wyper, Enel. Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Nonetheless, what shall we do now?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sure they'll get there safely.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm not crying, stupid blue sea woman!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: I left my backpack outside and...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: And I can't find the exit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Are they at the Golden City already?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You want a piece of me? HUH!?

summary: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
